chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1051 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22-09-2022 Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Comments are filed on behalf of respondents No.1 to 5, which reflects that an amount of Rs.7,388,648.00, outstanding towards LPR 12 months and commutation value, is payable to the petitioner being his retirement benefits. Since the amount is admitted by respondents No.1 to 5, this petition is disposed of by directing them to pay the same to the petitioner within three months hereof. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
